title: Scalable synthesis of dispersible iron carbide (Fe3C) nanoparticles by ‘nanocasting’
abstract: MgO powder is used as a removable ‘cast’ in a simple, scalable synthesis of dispersible Fe<sub>3</sub>C nanoparticles.
subject: Materials science
